name: Trick & Treat Remake
short_description: This is the remake version of the free game Trick & Treat, with some visual updates such as redrawn maps and new UIs. It's a light-hearted Halloween adventure in a vampire's house, where you explore the mansion and solve puzzles in the spooky atmosphere.
detailed_description:
- About the Remake -

This is the remake version of the free game Trick & Treat.

+ Visual updates: Remade maps in the retro pixel art style; New UIs.
+ The game is now in a 16:9 widescreen size, and up to 1920x1280 resolutions (though unnecessary)
+ Pressing F12 can take a screenshot, instead of bring you back to the title screen (finally!)
+ The art is still in the old doodle-style, to keep the original cute/horror atmosphere
+ The puzzles, stories, and music are basically the same as the free version
+ Some new bonus art in Extra

> Join the Rabbiton Discord!

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Russian, German, Spanish - Spain
